name: Snyk
description: Import open-source vulnerability findings from Snyk for dependency and container scanning.
setup_guide_md:
## Snyk integration

Import open-source and container vulnerability findings from Snyk into the OpenSec queue.

### Prerequisites

1. A Snyk account with at least one monitored project
2. A Snyk **API token**

### Get your API token

1. Go to **Account Settings** in Snyk
2. Under **Auth Token**, click **Click to show** or generate a new one
3. Copy the token

*This integration will be available in a future release.*

credentials_schema.label: API token
credentials_schema.help_text: Snyk API token from your account settings.

credentials_schema.label: Organization ID
credentials_schema.help_text: Snyk organization ID (optional, defaults to your default org).
